input.utterance: I like using small texts so it doesn't cover too much of the content

Your next render will use this.", "suggestions": ["Make it a bit bigger", "Move text to top", "Change text color", "Use a different font"], "needs_clarification": false}

output.reply: Done — I've set your text to 40px (the smallest readable size for 1080×1920 video). Your next render will use this.

meta.case: User requests small text — agent emits text_size_px at the floor (40) since 'small' maps to 40-48px. Added for 2026-06-07-v2 prompt which documents px scale.
